units.source_text: (1)	 The financial information from 2017 to 2019 is presented on the
31 December financial year-end basis. The financial information
units.translation_zh: 12月31日财政年度结束基准列示。财务资料

units.source_text: from 2015 to 2016 is presented on the 30 November financial
year-end basis. For clarity, the growth rates are presented on the
units.translation_zh: 年度结束基准列示。为清晰起见，增长率按
12月31日财政年度结束基准列示。

units.source_text: (2)	 Value of new business (VONB) is the present value, measured at the
units.translation_zh: (2) 新业务价值是以销售时点计量的

units.source_text: point of sale, of projected after-tax statutory profits emerging in the
units.translation_zh: 未来新售业务产生的预计税后法定利润的现值，

units.source_text: future from new business sold in the period less the cost of holding
units.translation_zh: 减去为支持该业务而持有

units.source_text: the required capital in excess of regulatory reserves to support this
units.translation_zh: 超出监管准备金要求的所需资本成本

units.source_text: (3)	 Annualised new premiums (ANP) is a measure of new business
activity that is calculated as the sum of 100 per cent of annualised
units.translation_zh: 活动指标，按年化首年保费的100%

units.source_text: first year premiums and 10 per cent of single premiums, before
units.translation_zh: 加一次性保费的10%计算，均为

units.source_text: (4)	 Operating profit after tax (OPAT) is shown after non-controlling
units.translation_zh: (4) 税后营运利润已扣除非控股

units.source_text: (5)	 Total weighted premium income (TWPI) consists of 100 per cent of
units.translation_zh: (5) 总加权保费收入包括续期保费的100%、

units.source_text: renewal premiums, 100 per cent of first year premiums and 10 per
units.translation_zh: 首年保费的100%以及一次性保费的10%

units.source_text: cent of single premiums, before reinsurance ceded.
units.translation_zh: 均为扣除分出再保险前。

units.source_text: (6)	 Embedded value (EV) is an actuarially determined estimate of the
economic value of a life insurance business based on a particular
units.translation_zh: 人寿保险业务经济价值的精算估计，基于特定

units.source_text: set of assumptions as to future experience, excluding any economic
units.translation_zh: 未来经验假设，不包括归属于未来新

units.source_text: value attributable to future new business. EV Equity is the total of
units.translation_zh: 业务的任何经济价值。内含价值权益为

units.source_text: embedded value, goodwill and other intangible assets.
units.translation_zh: 内含价值、商誉和其他无形资产的合计。

units.source_text: (7)	 Based on local statutory basis, before unallocated Group Office
units.translation_zh: (7) 按当地法定基准，未扣除未分配集团办公室

units.source_text: expenses and deduction of the amount attributable to non-controlling
interests, VONB by segment includes pension business.
units.translation_zh: 权益应占金额，分部新业务价值包括养老金业务。

to non-controlling interests, as previously disclosed. The IFRS
units.translation_zh: 非控股权益金额前列报，如此前披露。国际财务报告准则

units.translation_zh: 下塔塔友邦人寿业绩采用权益法入账。

units.translation_zh: (1) 2019,年其他市场的年化新保费和新业务价值包括塔塔友邦人寿保险有限公司（塔塔友邦人寿）49%的业绩，以反映我们的

units.source_text: shareholding. The contribution to ANP and VONB amount to US$182 million and US$38 million respectively. The total reported VONB for the Group in 2019
units.translation_zh: 持股。其对年化新保费和新业务价值的贡献分别为182百万美元和38百万美元。集团2019年报告的新业务价值总额

units.source_text: excludes the VONB attributable to non-controlling interests of US$32 million. For 2018, neither ANP nor VONB have been restated and they do not include

units.source_text: any contribution from Tata AIA Life or deduct the amount attributable to non-controlling interests. As disclosed in our Annual Report 2018, the VONB

units.source_text: attributable to non-controlling interests for 2018 is US$27 million.
units.translation_zh: 中归属于非控股权益的2018年金额为27百万美元。

units.source_text: VONB grew by 6 per cent to US$4,154 million in 2019 as very strong growth in Mainland China and Other
units.translation_zh: 2019年新业务价值增长6%，达到4,154百万美元，因中国内地和其他

units.source_text: Markets was largely offset by a 5 per cent decline in Hong Kong where the social unrest in the second half of
units.translation_zh: 市场非常强劲的增长，大部分被香港5%的下降所抵消，后者因下半年社会事件

units.source_text: 2019 drove a substantial decline in the Mainland Chinese visitor customer segment.
units.translation_zh: 2019年导致中国内地访客客户分部大幅下降。

units.source_text: ANP increased by 2 per cent to US$6,585 million and VONB margin increased by 3.0 pps to 62.9 per cent.
units.translation_zh: 年化新保费增长2%至6,585百万美元，新业务价值利润率上升3.0个百分点至62.9%。

units.source_text: PVNBP margin increased to 11 per cent from 10 per cent in 2018. Despite the lower interest rate environment in
units.translation_zh: 按现值计算的新业务保费利润率由2018.年的10%升至11%。尽管利率环境在

units.source_text: the second half of 2019, both VONB margin and PVNBP margin improved in 2019, supported by the enhanced
units.translation_zh: 2019,年下半年走低，新业务价值利润率和按现值计算的新业务保费利润率均在2019,年改善，受益于

units.source_text: profitability in our long-term savings and protection products in Hong Kong and the positive effect of a tax rule
units.translation_zh: 香港长期储蓄和保障产品盈利能力提升，以及税务规则的积极影响

units.source_text: change that increased the tax deductibility of commissions in Mainland China.
units.translation_zh: 该变更提高了中国内地佣金的税前扣除比例。

units.source_text: Agency distribution accounted for 74 per cent of the Group’s total VONB. The consistent execution of our
units.translation_zh: 代理分销占集团新业务价值总额的74%。我们持续执行

units.source_text: Premier Agency strategy helped generate 11 per cent VONB growth to US$3,243 million and a 5 per cent
units.translation_zh: 卓越代理策略，推动新业务价值增长11%至3,243百万美元，并使活跃代理人数增加5%

units.source_text: increase in the number of active agents. Partnership distribution VONB reduced by 1 per cent to US$1,142
units.translation_zh: 活跃代理人数增加。伙伴分销新业务价值下降1%至1,142

units.source_text: million. Strong growth from our bancassurance channel was offset by the significant decline in new business
units.translation_zh: 百万美元。银行保险渠道的强劲增长被新业务显著下降所抵消

units.source_text: from the Hong Kong retail IFA channel in the second half of 2019, reflecting the reduction in visitor arrivals and
units.translation_zh: 来自香港零售独立财务顾问渠道的新业务在2019,年下半年下降，反映访港旅客减少和

units.translation_zh: 香港，集团代理分销的新业务价值增长16%，伙伴

units.translation_zh: 香港2019.年报告新业务价值下降5%。本地客户

units.source_text: customer segment was more than offset by a substantial decline in VONB from the Mainland Chinese visitor
units.translation_zh: 分部的新业务价值实现双位数增长，但被中国内地访客

units.translation_zh: 客户分部新业务价值大幅下滑所抵消，该下滑大致跟随

units.source_text: the Hong Kong Tourism Board, in the second half of 2019. VONB margin increased by 4.1 pps to 66.1 per cent,
units.translation_zh: 香港旅游发展局报告的2019.年下半年中国内地访港旅客减少。新业务价值利润率上升4.1个百分点至66.1%，

units.source_text: mainly driven by enhanced profitability in our long-term savings and protection products.
units.translation_zh: 主要由长期储蓄和保障产品盈利能力提升推动。

units.source_text: Mainland China delivered very strong VONB growth of 27 per cent to US$1,167 million. Our Premier Agency
units.translation_zh: 中国内地新业务价值强劲增长27%至1,167百万美元。我们的卓越代理

units.translation_zh: 策略支持活跃代理人数实现双位数增长，并进一步提升生产力。新业务价值利润率

units.translation_zh: 部分被保障产品中提升保单持有人利益的影响所抵消。

units.source_text: Thailand continued to benefit from strong progress in both our Financial Adviser (FA) programme and our

units.source_text: growth of 6 per cent to US$494 million in 2019. VONB margin decreased to 67.7 per cent mainly as a result of
units.translation_zh: 2019.年增长6%至494百万美元。新业务价值利润率降至67.7%，主要由于

units.translation_zh: 银行保险业务占比提高。

units.translation_zh: 2019年新加坡新业务价值保持稳定，为352百万美元，定期保费销售增长被

units.translation_zh: 伙伴分销渠道较低的一次性保费销售所抵消。

分行银行保险渠道销售增加支持。
